cmd.add.invalid_platform: Invalid platform: {platform}. Valid: youtube, twitch, bilibili
cmd.add.unrecognized_url: Unrecognized URL. Supported: youtube.com, twitch.tv, live.bilibili.com
cmd.add.bilibili_hint: Bilibili requires a numeric UID or room URL (e.g. live.bilibili.com/60989). Username search is not supported.
cmd.add.twitch_no_creds: Twitch credentials not configured. Please set client_id and client_secret in WebUI.
cmd.list.empty: No monitors configured. Use /live add to get started.
cmd.check.unknown: Could not determine status for {channel_id} on {platform}
cmd.lang.invalid: Invalid language: {lang}. Valid: en, zh-Hans, zh-Hant
cmd.notify.invalid: Invalid option: {value}. Use on or off
cmd.end_notify.enabled: End-of-stream notifications enabled for this group
cmd.end_notify.disabled: End-of-stream notifications disabled for this group
cmd.end_notify.invalid: Invalid option: {value}. Use on or off
error.rate_limited: {platform} is currently rate-limiting requests. Please try again later.
cmd.test_notify.scheduled: Test notification will be sent in {delay} seconds.
cmd.test_notify.invalid_delay: Invalid delay. Please provide a positive integer (e.g., /live test_notify 10).
cmd.test_notify.delay_too_long: Delay too long. Maximum is {max} seconds.
cmd.test_notify.not_ready: Plugin not ready. Please wait for initialization.
cmd.test_notify.already_pending: A test notification is already pending for this group.
